grad_secretary.routes
=====================

.. py:module:: grad_secretary.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Graduate secretary routes: student records, transcripts, course schedule, and grade overrides.

   All routes require an authenticated session with role 'grad_secretary' or
   'system_admin'. Routes are registered on the 'grad_secretary' blueprint.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   grad_secretary.routes.index
   grad_secretary.routes.records
   grad_secretary.routes.student_transcript
   grad_secretary.routes.schedule
   grad_secretary.routes.override_grades
   grad_secretary.routes.submit_override
   grad_secretary.routes.add_offering
